x-enumeration-literals.name: Current
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used to post debits and credits when no specific account has been nominated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CardAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for credit card payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashPayment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for the payment of cash.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Charges
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Account used for charges if different from the account for
payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashIncome
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for payment of income if different from the current cash account

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commission
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Account used for commission if different from the account
for payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: ClearingParticipantSettlementAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used to post settlement debit and credit entries on behalf of a designated Clearing Participant.

x-enumeration-literals.name: LimitedLiquiditySavingsAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for savings with special interest and withdrawal terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for loans.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MarginalLending
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for a marginal lending facility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: MoneyMarket
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Account used for money markets if different from the cash
account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NonResidentExternal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for non-resident external.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is used for overdrafts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OverNightDeposit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for overnight deposits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: OtherAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account not otherwise specified.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used to post debit and credit entries, as a result of transactions cleared and settled through a specific clearing and settlement system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Salary
x-enumeration-literals.description: Accounts used for salary payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Savings
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for savings.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tax
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Account used for taxes if different from the account for
payment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TransactingAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: A transacting account is the most basic type of bank account that you can get. The main difference between transaction and cheque accounts is that you usually do not get a cheque book with your transacting account and neither are you offered an overdraft facility.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CashTrading
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account used for trading if different from the current cash account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: VirtualAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account created virtually to facilitate collection and reconciliation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: NonResidentForeignCurrencyAccount
x-enumeration-literals.description: Non-Resident Individual / Entity Foreign Current held domestically.
